ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population_millions" REAL /* Population in millions */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Urban population in millions */,
  "rural_population" REAL /* Rural population in millions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GDP data */,
  "gdp_billions_usd" REAL /* GDP in billions of US dollars */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate as a percentage */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in US dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "per_capita_income" (
  "pci_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each per capita income record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the per capita income data */,
  "pci_usd" REAL /* Per capita income in US dollars */,
  "pci_growth_rate" REAL /* Per capita income growth rate as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pci_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_per_capita_income_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchasing_power" (
  "pp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchasing power record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the purchasing power data */,
  "pp_billions_usd" REAL /* Purchasing power in billions of US dollars */,
  "pp_growth_rate" REAL /* Purchasing power growth rate as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchasing_power_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., population, GDP, per capita income) */,
  "data_filter" TEXT /* Filters applied to the data (e.g., country, year range) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Description of the data coverage (e.g., countries, years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log detailing updates made to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data commented on (e.g., population, GDP, per capita income) */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the comment (e.g., from data administrators) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data the tag is associated with (e.g., population, GDP, per capita income) */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., economic indicator, geographic region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualized (e.g., population, GDP, per capita income) */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart, map) */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the publication */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data used in the publication (e.g., population, GDP, per capita income) */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., report, article, research paper) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_publications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
